message:
feat(lab/runtime): add TLA+ trace export for bounded model checking

Add `export_tla()` method to LabRunReport that converts captured runtime
trace events into a TLA+ behavior module suitable for TLC model checking.

The method creates a concrete state sequence from trace events with
property templates for the 6 core temporal oracle invariants, enabling
post-hoc model checking of lab run traces against formal specifications.
Returns None if no trace events were captured or if the exporter produces
zero snapshots (degenerate runs).

This bridges the gap between runtime observation (oracle reports) and
formal verification (TLA+ model checking), allowing lab runs to produce
artifacts that can be independently verified by TLC.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
